title: JustImproved
description: A modpack focused on improving Quality of Life (QoL) with convenient features and enhancements for a smoother Minecraft experience.
body:
# JustImproved

Enhance your Minecraft experience with a focus on both performance and quality of life improvements:

- **Performance Optimizations**: Enjoy smoother gameplay and reduced lag.
- **Quality of Life Features**: Streamlined inventory management, improved crafting systems, and small tweaks that make your gameplay easier and more efficient.

This modpack offers a balanced experience, improving gameplay without overwhelming you with unnecessary complexity. Perfect for players seeking convenience and a better Minecraft journey.

- 💥 Get a lightweight experience with [JustSmooth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/justsmooth)
